name: school-election-video
description: Video educativo animado sobre a eleicao de diretores escolares em portugues do Brasil.

scripts.render: npx remotion render src/index.ts MainVideo out/school-election.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18
scripts.render:hd: npx remotion render src/index.ts MainVideo out/school-election.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18
scripts.render:master: npx remotion render src/index.ts MainVideo out/school-election-master.mov --codec=prores --prores-profile=4444-xq --audio-codec=pcm-16
scripts.render:frames: npx remotion render src/index.ts MainVideo out/frames --image-sequence --video-image-format=png
scripts.still: npx remotion still src/index.ts MainVideo --frame=0 out/thumbnail.png
scripts.thumbnail: npx remotion still src/index.ts MainVideo --frame=0 docs/thumbnail.png
